title: Data language without overclaiming
subtitle: Describe data cautiously.
overview: B2 speakers avoid making claims the data cannot prove.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: there seems to be a trend
no se puede afirmar con seguridad
one would have to analyze more data

items.es: Los datos sugieren que el uso del transporte público ha aumentado.
items.en: The data suggest that the use of public transport has increased.

items.es: Parece haber una tendencia positiva desde enero.
items.en: There seems to be a positive trend since January.

items.es: No se puede afirmar con seguridad cuál es la causa.
items.en: One cannot state with certainty what the cause is.

items.es: Habría que analizar más datos antes de sacar conclusiones.
items.en: One would have to analyze more data before drawing conclusions.

items.es: Aun así, el cambio parece significativo.
items.en: Even so, the change seems significant.
